The '''''Star Wars: Episode I - Queen Amidala Paper Doll Book''''' contains a paper doll of [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala|Amidala]] that can be dressed in several of her costumes from [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].

A similar book, the ''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones - Padmé Amidala Paper Doll Book]]'', was published three years later.

==Publisher's summary==
''Make part of Star Wars: Episode I come alive just for you!''

''Queen Amidala of Naboo is a brave and beautiful ruler whose exotic costumes provide her with an air of regal mystery. Inside this book you'll find a collection of the Queen's most gorgeous gowns, each one more richly detailed than the next.''

''Now you can act as her handmaiden. Punch out her entire wardrobe and dress the Queen as you wish. Then, with an adult's help, remove the staples at the spine of this book and pull out the pages. The inside covers will provide a colorful backdrop of the Queen's Theed palace!''
